name: Global baseline qualification review
change_note: Align applicant role tokens with canonical list; add expiry/renewal monitoring requirement.

requirements.requirement: Confirm the applicant is eligible for the selected platform, marketplace site, and seller route.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing or unsupported seller eligibility prevents approval.
requirements.notes: Verify official platform policy for the exact marketplace site.

requirements.requirement: Applicant legal name must match submitted entity documents or have a clear authorization chain.
evidence_expected: authorization document if applicant differs from rights holder
requirements.decision_effect: Major mismatch is high severity and normally requires more information or rejection.
requirements.notes: Use official company registry when available.

requirements.requirement: Brand ownership or authorization must cover product scope, territory, marketplace/channel, and review period.
requirements.decision_effect: Missing or out-of-scope authorization is high severity.
requirements.notes: Trademark territory and class should be checked in the relevant official registry when decision depends on it.

requirements.requirement: Product category must not be prohibited by the platform or destination country.
requirements.decision_effect: Confirmed prohibited category is critical and leads to rejection.
requirements.notes: If uncertain, escalate human review for high-risk categories.

requirements.requirement: Product compliance documents must match the product name, SKU/model, manufacturing site, certificate scope, and destination market.
requirements.decision_effect: Mismatch or expired evidence is high severity if the category requires certification.
requirements.notes: Exact evidence depends on category and market.

requirements.requirement: Labels, warnings, language, and claims must be compatible with the destination market and platform listing rules.
requirements.decision_effect: Unsubstantiated or regulated claims can require rejection or human escalation.
requirements.notes: Medical, therapeutic, antimicrobial, child-safety, food, supplement, and cosmetic claims require extra caution.

requirements.requirement: Expiry dates and renewal obligations for licenses, certificates, and authorizations are recorded.
requirements.decision_effect: Unknown validity of a core document prevents approval until confirmed.
requirements.notes: Feeds renewal monitoring after the decision.

gaps: Country-specific regulator map must be verified per case.
Platform-country seller route must be verified per case.
Category-specific mandatory evidence must be verified per case.
